strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with strong Node.js and TypeScript track record across multiple production environments
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) development at re:cinq, directly matching the AI agent experience requirement
Proven testing culture advocate — built testing libraries, ran TDD workshops, and applied CI/CD and trunk-based development throughout career
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin absent from the resume; Java experience is limited and dated (embedded/robotics context at Altom, 2016–2018)
Heavy investment in DLang across several key roles suggests possible stack drift; Vitest and Playwright not mentioned in testing experience
response.justification: Aisha brings substantial fullstack depth with TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes — ticking most required boxes — and her current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which is a direct match for one of the more differentiating requirements. The main gaps are Nest.js (the specified backend framework) and Kotlin (the secondary language), neither of which is insurmountable given her demonstrated ability to pick up new tools rapidly. Overall a strong candidate worth interviewing.
